sections.instruction: Questions 11-14: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 15-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: According to the liaison officer, what do volunteers help provide? {{BLANK}}

They are volunteering to help out at a school which is increasing its students’ {{BLANK}} in a number of subject areas. The {{BLANK}} programme is well underway. It’s a well equipped school and the liaison officer is particularly impressed by the {{BLANK}} The school offers many things to do outside the curriculum and students are encouraged to take part in {{BLANK}}
